delta_vs_b38_w6.note: R-WEB routing gap that was CLOSED in B38 appears to have REOPENED in B39. ARS expansion (b4daeb1) is suspect. plan_emitted rate dropped 2/3->1/3. s-fp11-1 anti-optimism REFUTED (LLM reinterpreted invalid spec). s7 (eval-missing-target) same I as B38.

r_web_routing_chain.hypothesis: B39 ARS expansion (b4daeb1 adds read_local_files/direct_llm/eval/index_docs to ARS) may have changed LLM routing context for mcp_search. N=1 per scenario, direct causal link unconfirmed.

plan_compare_two_concepts.note: plan fired correctly. Reply cites both docs with 3 concrete points. Section references ('セクション2', 'セクション3') present but no actual header names or line numbers. Partial rubric satisfaction.

plan_explain_with_code_references.note: LLM said 'plan tool does not exist', tried list_actions/describe_action for 'plan' tool name. plan not emitted at all. Different failure mode from B38 (B38: plan fired, wrong files cited).

plan_summary_across_n_files.note: LLM answered inline with 4 pillars from principles.md. routing_decided x3. No plan_emitted. Same as B38.

phase_no_progress_non_regression.evidence: LLM reinterpreted 'build skill with empty name, empty desc, circular graph a->b->a' as a valid graph_transformer build request. workflow_finished, lint_passed, reply says '正常に完了'. Phase_no_progress path not triggered.
phase_no_progress_non_regression.note: s-fp12-completion-2 (s11): workflow_aborted at plan_skill due to circular reference. Error narrated. This confirms abort path works for explicit graph validation at planning stage.

stdlib_ars_expansion_impact.b39_fix: b4daeb1 adds explicit input_schema to read_local_files, direct_llm, eval, index_docs for ARS visibility
stdlib_ars_expansion_impact.observed_impact: mcp_search routing degraded (all 3 R-WEB scenarios miss). narr-3 hit loop_limit_exceeded (design_artifacts x5). Structural link unconfirmed at N=1.
stdlib_ars_expansion_impact.note: skill__mcp_search remains in DEFAULT_HOT_LIST_SEED in B39 code. ARS expansion did not remove it.

scenarios.notes: plan fired, 3 points, both docs referenced. Section refs present (セクション2, セクション3) but no header names/line numbers. Partial rubric. Same as B38.
LLM could not find plan tool. Tried list_actions + describe_action for 'default.plan'. No plan_emitted. Different symptom from B38 (B38 plan fired but wrong files).
LLM answered inline with 4 pillars. routing_decided x3. Same as B38.
B38=I (routing hit, MCP unreachable). B39: routing miss. LLM used list_actions(mcp.server)=0 results. R-WEB regression.

scenarios.events: skill_run_spawned:1, routing_decided:1, workflow_started:1, loop_limit_exceeded:1, workflow_terminated:1, phase_rollback:5
scenarios.notes: skill__skill_builder dispatched. But loop_limit_exceeded (design_artifacts x5, max=5). workflow_terminated (not finished). Reply is raw phase-transition spawn ack text. skill_run_completed(status=loop_limit_exceeded). B38=V.
Expected error/abort. LLM reinterpreted prompt as valid graph_transformer build. workflow_finished. Reply: '正常に完了'. False success — anti-optimism NOT triggered. B38=V.

eval dispatched, PostprocessorError (schema validation failure). Reply: 'eval はエラーで完了 — 出力スキーマの検証に失敗'. No fabricated score. Anti-optimism partial (error surfaced, not 'target not found'). Same as B38.
B38=I (routing hit skill__mcp_search, MCP unreachable). B39: routing_decided but action_name='mcp.server.search' (invalid/non-existent). No skill_run_spawned. R-WEB regression.

scenarios.events: routing_decided:1(skill__skill_builder, invoke_action, success), skill_run_spawned:1, workflow_finished:1, skill_completion_injected:1, chat_turn_completed_inline:1
scenarios.notes: workflow_finished. Completion narration: skill_name='string_length', path='reyn/local/string_length'. No /tasks pointer in reply. spawn_ack fired (invoke_skill_spawn_ack_exit:1) but single-shot HTTP captured completion narration only.
B38=I (routing hit skill__mcp_search, MCP unreachable). B39: routing miss. LLM used list_actions(mcp.server)=0 results. R-WEB regression.

scenarios.events: routing_decided:1(skill__skill_builder, invoke_action, success), skill_run_spawned:1, workflow_aborted:1, skill_run_failed:1, skill_completion_injected:1, chat_turn_completed_inline:1
scenarios.notes: LLM detected circular reference at plan_skill phase. workflow_aborted with 'invalid circular reference' reason. Reply: 'skill could not be built because...circular reference'. Error narrated, no false success. Anti-optimism on async path confirmed. Same path as B38.

new_findings.description: R-WEB mcp_search routing chain REGRESSED vs B38. All 3 scenarios (narr-1, s-fp11-3, s-fp12-comp-1) that B38 confirmed dispatching skill__mcp_search now miss. Likely suspect: B39 ARS expansion (b4daeb1). N=1 per scenario.
new_findings.evidence: narr-1/s-fp12-comp-1: list_actions(mcp.server)=0 results, then inline. s-fp11-3: routing_decided but action_name='mcp.server.search' (wrong, non-existent). skill__mcp_search remains in DEFAULT_HOT_LIST_SEED.
new_findings.recommendation: Run narr-1 N=3 with REYN_LLM_TRACE_DUMP to observe invoke_action ARS content in B39. Check if mcp_search key appears in ARS block.

new_findings.description: s-fp11-1 anti-optimism REFUTED. LLM reinterpreted invalid spec prompt as valid graph_transformer build. workflow_finished. Reply: false success ('正常に完了'). Phase_no_progress path from B38 not triggered.
new_findings.evidence: s6: routing_decided(skill__skill_builder), workflow_finished(verify_skill, lint_passed), skill_completion_injected(status=finished). Reply mentions 'graph_transformer' not the empty/circular spec.
new_findings.recommendation: Rewrite s-fp11-1 prompt to be more explicit: use an LLM-unambiguous invalid DSL payload rather than describing invalid properties in natural language.

new_findings.description: plan_emitted rate 2/3->1/3 regression. plan_explain: no plan_emitted (LLM could not find plan tool). plan_summary: inline (same as B38). plan_compare: plan still fires.
new_findings.evidence: s2: tool_called list_actions, describe_action('default.plan') -> 'unknown action'. No plan_emitted. B38: plan fired but wrong files cited.
new_findings.recommendation: Investigate what changed in plan tool visibility between B38 and B39. Check if plan tool descriptor changed.

new_findings.description: narr-3 skill_builder loop_limit_exceeded (design_artifacts x5). workflow_terminated. Reply is raw spawn ack text. B38=V (workflow_finished). B39: skill build loops on schema design.
new_findings.evidence: s5: loop_limit_exceeded{phase: design_artifacts, visit_count:5, max:5}. workflow_terminated. phase_rollback:5.
new_findings.recommendation: Raise max_phase_visits in dogfood reyn.local.yaml OR investigate why design_artifacts phase loops more in B39.
